num_channels.description: Number of identical and statistically independent channels in the monitoring system

channel_threshold.description: Minimum number of channels that must register dangerous radioactivity level for automatic reactor shutdown (k-out-of-n threshold for channels)

num_sensors_per_channel.description: Number of identical sensors in each channel

sensor_threshold.description: Minimum number of sensors that must register dangerous radioactivity level for the channel to register the dangerous level (k-out-of-n threshold for sensors)

sensor_failure_rate.description: Independent failure rate of each sensor in any channel, per day

common_cause_failure_rate.description: Common-cause failure rate of all sensors in a channel, per day

time_t.description: Time points (in days) at which system reliability is evaluated

system_reliability.description: System reliability computed at the corresponding time points
